front_line: Data center cooling systems for the AI chip buildout
thesis: Every new data center becomes a 5-7 year recurring revenue stream as AI chips get hotter. But SOLS is missing earnings badly while trading at 89x free cash flow with $1.77B debt against only $142M FCF.
moat: Switching costs only apply to replacements, not new construction
risks: Consecutive quarters of 15-35% earnings misses during supposed demand boom

drafts.x_post: SOLS makes cooling systems for AI data centers. Massive demand, but they're missing earnings by 15-35% while trading at 89x FCF. Watch until execution improves. Dead Simple Score: 86 🥈
video_talking_points: SOLS provides thermal cooling systems to data centers during the AI buildout boom.
AI chips are getting denser and hotter, creating exponential demand for cooling solutions.
Each new contract becomes recurring revenue for 5-7 years as the physics problem worsens.
They've missed earnings by 15-35% in consecutive quarters with dangerous debt levels.
Watchlist only until they prove they can execute in this massive opportunity.

image.query: Computer or data center COOLING (something related to cooling and AI)
